headline: Teledyne (NYSE:TDY) Beats Expectations in Strong Q2 CY2026
summary: Digital imaging and instrumentation provider Teledyne (NYSE:TDY) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 9.8% year on year to $1.66 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $6.28 per share was 8.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
